food_subgroup: Sliced wholemeal sandwich bread with added Vitamin D; 2 slices approximately 70g; manufactured by Gardenia Bakeries (Singapore) Pte Ltd under the Sunshine brand; carries HPB Healthier Choice Symbol

ontology.foodex2_description: Bread and similar products — wholemeal/wholegrain bread
ontology.foodex2_gap_note: No FoodEx2 code specific to Vitamin-D-fortified wholemeal bread; A000F (bread and similar products) used as closest defensible parent. Fortification detail documented in notes.
ontology.snomed_ct_gap_note: No SNOMED CT code identified for this specific fortified commercial wholemeal bread product; left null to preserve ontology honesty.

serving.natural_language_portion: One standard serving is 2 slices (approximately 70g), which is the typical portion used for a sandwich or toast at breakfast.

nutrient_source.title: Sunshine Vitamin-D Wholemeal Bread — Nutrition Information Panel (NIP), Gardenia Bakeries Singapore (Sunshine brand) product label
nutrient_source.organization: Gardenia Bakeries (Singapore) Pte Ltd — Sunshine brand; Singapore product Nutrition Information Panel
nutrient_source.source_match_notes: Nutrient values taken directly from the Sunshine Vitamin-D Wholemeal Bread product NIP as published by Gardenia Bakeries Singapore. This is a USDA Branded Food-equivalent primary product label source. Values are per 100g as declared on pack.

gi_source.title: Glycemic Index of wholemeal bread (wheat bran intact) — University of Sydney GI Database
gi_source.source_match_notes: GI value of 62 derived from University of Sydney GI Database range of 58–65 for wholemeal bread with intact wheat bran. Sunshine Vitamin-D Wholemeal Bread is a commercially produced wholemeal bread with intact bran; GI 62 used as the central estimate within the published range. GL per 70g serving calculated as (62 × 43g carbohydrate per 100g × 70g serving) / 100 = 18.7.

hypertension.key_factor: Sodium 371mg per 100g (260mg per 70g serving = 13% of 2,000mg daily limit); partially offset by potassium 220mg per 100g
hypertension.guidance: Patients with hypertension should limit to 1–2 servings per day and account for the 260mg sodium per 2-slice serving within their daily sodium budget of 2,000mg; the 154mg potassium per serving provides partial sodium-offsetting benefit.

type2_diabetes.key_factor: GI 62 (medium), GL 18.7 per 70g serving; dietary fibre 4.2g per serving supports slower glucose absorption
type2_diabetes.guidance: Sunshine Wholemeal Bread is a meaningful upgrade from white bread (GI ~71, GL ~24) for T2DM patients — the lower GI (62), higher fibre (4.2g per 2-slice serving), and Vitamin D fortification (5.6mcg per serving) make it a clinically defensible daily bread choice when portion is controlled to 2 slices.

cardiovascular_disease.key_factor: Low saturated fat (0.8g per 100g), zero trans fat, 6g dietary fibre per 100g, and zero cholesterol support cardiovascular health
cardiovascular_disease.guidance: The low saturated fat (0.56g per 70g serving), zero trans fat, and high dietary fibre (4.2g per 70g serving) profile of Sunshine Wholemeal Bread is consistent with heart-healthy dietary guidelines; it is suitable as a daily staple for CVD patients when sodium intake is monitored.

rheumatoid_arthritis.key_factor: Vitamin D 8mcg per 100g (5.6mcg per 70g serving = ~37% of 15mcg RDI); selenium 20mcg per 100g supports antioxidant pathways
rheumatoid_arthritis.guidance: For RA patients, the Vitamin D fortification (5.6mcg per 2-slice serving) addresses the widespread Vitamin D insufficiency prevalent in Singapore's largely indoor population, and Vitamin D deficiency is associated with higher RA disease activity; selenium (14mcg per serving) supports glutathione peroxidase anti-inflammatory activity.

llm_training.natural_language_description: Sunshine Vitamin-D Wholemeal Bread is a commercially produced, sliced wholemeal sandwich bread manufactured by Gardenia Bakeries (Singapore) Pte Ltd under the Sunshine sub-brand. It is Singapore's most clinically relevant mainstream packaged bread, distinguished by its Vitamin D fortification (8mcg per 100g, providing approximately 37% of the 15mcg adult RDI per 2-slice serving) — a feature specifically addressing the widespread Vitamin D insufficiency documented in Singapore's largely indoor workforce despite the country's near-equatorial location. The bread is made from wholemeal wheat flour with intact bran, giving it a denser texture and nuttier flavour than white sandwich bread. It carries the HPB (Health Promotion Board) Healthier Choice Symbol. Nutritionally, it provides 227 kcal per 100g, 9g protein, 3.6g fat (0.8g saturated), 43g carbohydrate, 6g dietary fibre, and 371mg sodium per 100g. The glycemic index is approximately 62 (medium), with a glycemic load of 18.7 per standard 2-slice (70g) serving — meaningfully lower than Gardenia white bread (GI ~71, GL ~24). The 4.2g dietary fibre per 2-slice serving approaches 15% of the daily fibre RDI. For clinicians managing T2DM patients who habitually consume white bread, recommending Sunshine Wholemeal is a realistic, culturally feasible dietary intervention that reduces postprandial glucose excursion while maintaining a familiar breakfast format. The bread is vegan, halal-certified, and dairy-free.

confidence_reason: Nutrient values sourced directly from the Sunshine Vitamin-D Wholemeal Bread product Nutrition Information Panel (NIP) as published by Gardenia Bakeries Singapore — an exact product label match equivalent to a branded food primary source. GI value of 62 is well-supported by the University of Sydney GI Database range for wholemeal bread with intact bran (58–65). All core macros, secondary nutrients, and micronutrients are fully populated from the product label.
notes: monounsaturated_fat_g and polyunsaturated_fat_g set to -1: detailed fatty acid breakdown not declared on the Sunshine Vitamin-D Wholemeal Bread product NIP and not available in Singapore HPB database for this specific product as of April 2026. water_g set to -1: moisture content not declared on product NIP and not available in approved sources for this specific formulation. trans_fat_g is 0.0 — confirmed zero per product NIP declaration. cholesterol_mg is 0.0 — confirmed zero per product NIP; this is a plant-based bread product containing no animal-derived fat. vitamin_a_mcg_rae is 0.0 — confirmed zero per product NIP; no Vitamin A fortification in this product. vitamin_c_mg is 0.0 — confirmed zero per product NIP; no Vitamin C fortification. vitamin_b12_mcg is 0.0 — confirmed zero per product NIP; no B12 fortification. FoodEx2 code A000F used as closest defensible parent for bread and similar products; no FoodEx2 code specific to Vitamin-D-fortified wholemeal bread exists. SNOMED CT left null — no defensible code identified for this specific fortified commercial product. Sodium per 70g serving = 260mg (371mg × 0.70). GL calculation: (62 × 43 × 0.70) / 100 = 18.7.

Populated all per_100g fields using product NIP values; set -1 for monounsaturated_fat_g, polyunsaturated_fat_g, water_g with documented justification in notes.
Documented all zero values (trans_fat_g, cholesterol_mg, vitamin_a_mcg_rae, vitamin_c_mg, vitamin_b12_mcg) as confirmed zero per product NIP in notes.
Added FoodEx2 code A000F with gap note; retained FoodOn URI; added SNOMED CT null with honest gap note.
